summary: Currently working as a Software Development Engineer - III at GoHighLevel, building large-scale features across the Funnels & Websites Builder, Ecommerce platform, and AI products.
description: At HighLevel (all-in-one marketing CRM), I have contributed across the full breadth of the Funnels & Websites platform — from building out the Ecommerce suite end-to-end, to architecting the Schema Markup product and leading frontend development on the Page Builder AI Copilot. My work spans product architecture, full-stack feature development, testing infrastructure, release management, and mentorship.
keyFocus: Vue.js, Nuxt.js, NodeJS, NestJS, TailwindCSS, GCP, Jenkins, LangChain.js, OpenAI, Playwright, Vitest, Cursor, Claude

workExperience.title: Software Development Engineer - III
workExperience.description: Promoted to SDE-III, taking on broader ownership across the Funnels & Websites platform. Architected and built the Schema Markup product end-to-end and served as the primary frontend contributor on the Page Builder AI Copilot (Ask AI). Beyond feature development, established the unit testing framework for the funnels and page-builder codebases, designed a TDD-first registry-driven E2E suite for Schema Markup covering 19 schema families and 167 types. Took ownership of release management by leading Jenkins deployments across beta and production. Mentored new joiners through tech onboarding, delivered knowledge transfers across the Funnels and Schema Markup stacks, and participated in the interview loop. Leveraged AI-assisted development extensively (Cursor, Claude) as a force multiplier — a meaningful driver of throughput across the cross-repo scope of this role.

workExperience.title: Software Development Engineer - II
workExperience.description: As a Software Development Engineer at HighLevel, I specialized in both Ecommerce and Funnel Builder Core enhancements. I developed a robust inventory management system, integrated diverse shipping, tax, and payment flows, and built customer-facing features including wishlist, product search, featured products, and account management. In parallel, I worked on improving core builder components including design system integration, SEO automation, sidebar revamp, and new builder elements, all contributing to a highly scalable and conversion-oriented builder experience.

projects.name: Schema Markup
projects.description:
Architected and built HighLevel’s Schema Markup product end-to-end — a native SEO tool that enables users to create, validate, and publish structured data (JSON-LD) directly within the Funnels & Websites builder. My contributions included:

- Designed and built the full foundational architecture: form + JSON dual view, the field-renderer pattern, the JSON-LD transformer, and nested field handling — enabling support for 140+ schema types across 19 parent categories (LocalBusiness, Product, Article, FAQPage, HowTo, VideoObject, and more).
- Authored the HLD and LLD for both the main Schema Markup feature and the Schema Markup Bulk Management system.
- Owned two features through the full PRD → Dev → QA cycle as part of the Full Stack Builder initiative: JSON View enhancements and Nested Fields error handling.
- The product includes an AI flow that reads page content, identifies the best schema types, and auto-populates fields — reducing schema creation time from 20–30 minutes to under 2 minutes per page.
- Impact (since Feb ‘26 launch, ~2.5 months): 34,900+ schemas created across 5,590+ active customers; AI drove ~50% of all schemas (17,400+); schemas/week grew ~18x in 10 weeks; customers creating schemas/month grew from ~150 (Feb) → ~4,300 (Apr); AI flow maintaining 95%+ success rate with stable latency.

projects.name: Page Builder AI Copilot (Ask AI)
projects.description:
Primary frontend contributor on HighLevel’s Page Builder AI Copilot ("Ask AI") — an AI assistant embedded in the Funnels & Websites builder that generates complete funnels, websites, and page sections from natural language prompts. My contributions included:

- Built and owned the core UI experiences: assist-mode UX, drag-and-drop interactions, image styles, rate-limit modal, restore flow, error recovery, content filtering, and auto-naming.
- Worked on the element insertion agent, enabling AI to intelligently insert and configure individual builder elements within existing pages.
- The product supports three modes — Assist (guided generation), Build (prompt-to-funnel), and Chat (conversational refinement) — allowing users to go from idea to a live, conversion-ready funnel in under a minute.
- Impact (cumulative): 157,000+ funnels created/updated via AI across 61,100+ customers; monthly active customers grew ~3.5x and weekly chats grew ~6x from Oct ‘25 to Apr ‘26.

projects.name: Funnels & Websites Builder - Core
projects.description:
I contributed to the core Funnels & Websites Builder platform, focusing on usability, performance, and extensibility. My contributions included:

- Integrated a template library for webinars to broaden prebuilt content options for users.
- Revamped the builder’s sidebar to improve navigation and editing workflows.
- Led the integration of modern design system components across the builder for consistency.
- Introduced advanced elements like Multi-Popup, Flexbox container, and Block Editor to enhance design flexibility.
- Implemented automated SEO enhancements integrated with HighLevel’s new SEO product to improve visibility for published sites.
- Regularly resolved support tickets and platform bugs to maintain builder stability at scale.
- Impact: Supported 500,000+ weekly website visitors, 100,000+ daily active users, and enabled the creation of 100,000+ funnels monthly with a 90%+ retention rate.

projects.name: Funnels & Websites Builder - Ecommerce
projects.description:
As part of the team at HighLevel, I specialized in enhancing the Funnels & Websites builder with advanced Ecommerce functionalities. My contributions included:

- Built a robust inventory management system to track stock levels and manage product details efficiently, improving operational efficiency for businesses using HighLevel.
- Integrated various shipping solutions, including different carriers and methods, to provide flexibility and convenience for customers, thereby enhancing logistical flexibility for businesses.
- Developed secure payment processing features that support multiple payment methods, allowing businesses to handle transactions efficiently and boost customer trust.
- Implemented tax integrations to automate tax calculations and ensure compliance for businesses selling across different regions.
- Enhanced customer engagement by building wishlist functionality, product search, featured products, and a full account management system with customer login, enabling a richer shopping experience.
- Optimized Ecommerce page performance to improve load times and conversion rates for stores built on the platform.
- Impact: Enabled over 7,000+ live stores and facilitated 15,000+ monthly active orders through the Ecommerce platform.

summary: Worked as a Software Engineer working on BETSOL’s new SaaS platform as a Frontend Developer.
description: As a Software Engineer at BETSOL, a leading data management and intelligent automation company, I had the opportunity to work on the company's new SaaS platform, Sentinel. My journey began with extensive R&D, where I conducted in-depth research on a variety of solutions that could benefit the project. As the project transitioned into the development phase, I took on the role of a frontend developer, leveraging my expertise in building intuitive and user-friendly interfaces.
keyFocus: ReactJS, Redux, NodeJS, Material UI, Auth0, Agile/SAFe

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
workExperience.description: As a Software Engineer at BETSOL, I worked on the company's new SaaS platform, Sentinel, taking ownership of features, liaising with the UI/UX team, and playing a key role in decision-making. In addition, I have mentored junior team members, improving team performance and individual growth. I also played a critical role in PI planning and sprint grooming sessions, dividing feature requirements into user stories and delegating tasks among the team.

workExperience.title: Associate Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Worked as an Associate Software Engineer on BETSOL’s new SaaS platform as a Frontend Developer, developing and building critical features during the initial phases of the project.

projects.name: Sentinel
projects.description:
Sentinel is BETSOL's new SaaS platform for creating, managing and notifying subscriptions. It will enable a given user to view, backup and restore all of their devices’ data in one spot.

Being a part of a brand new project, apart from being a frontend developer, I worked on a lot of R&D as well before the start of development.

Some of my contributions to the project include:

- Researched, documented, and built POCs for various subscription management and user management services.
- Actively contributed to critical product design and wireframing sessions, shaping the final product.
- Set up the initial codebase for the project including aspects like finalizing the folder structure, Material UI Global theme config, Sonarqube, etc.
- Developed and owned various features' end-to-end implementation, ensuring strict adherence to design and code quality guidelines.
- Effectively handled payment-related features utilizing hosted components from payment gateways, while following the PCI guidelines.
- Implemented role-based access and sectioning and routing logic for the entire frontend application.

awards.title: Above and Beyond Award
awards.description: Received the above and beyond award for continued efforts towards the frontend codebase of Sentinel. This award was awarded for recognizing efforts in taking ownership of multiple features and modules of the project and performing R&D and improving the performance of the codbase as well as mentoring of juniors.

awards.title: Best Training Award - React
awards.description: The best training award was nominated by the campus batch of 2022. Among all the training subjects and topics, training conducted for react was voted the best.

awards.title: Spot Award
awards.description: Was awarded the Spot Award to recognize efforts put into researching new frameworks and services and building POCs during the R&D phase of Sentinel.

awards.title: Team Excellence - Sentinel
awards.description: The team excellence award was awarded to the Sentinel team for building the initial version of SaaS platform with multiple features within a short period of time.

awards.title: Team Excellence - Campus recruitment
awards.description: Was part of the campus interview panel team which won the team excellence award for interviewing 10,000 students from 160 colleges pan India.

otherResponsibilities.title: Campus Training
otherResponsibilities.description: I was one of the trainers for the Javascript and ReactJS training for the 2022 campus batch. My responsibilites included finalizing the syllabus, developing slides and content, designing projects and assignments and framing quiz questions. The training sessions went on for 3 days which included 3 code along projects and one final project assignment.

otherResponsibilities.title: Internship Mentoring
otherResponsibilities.description: I mentored multiple batches of interns on a new in-house product helping HRs onboard employees with ease. My responsibilities include overseeing the progress of the project, assigning tasks, teaching and mentoring when needed, taking technical decisions based on R&D performed and continuously evaluate the interns based on their performance.

summary: Interned at Dhiyo.ai, working on various core projects including the complete overhaul of Dhiyo's company website.
description: I worked as a Software Engineer Intern at Dhiyo.ai, a Multilingual Conversational AI Platform to Employ blue calller workers. I mainly worked on overhauling Dhiyo's company website rebuilding it with latest tools and technologies. I also worked on some of the side projects such as a Jio Phone version of Dhiyo and a job fair platform.
keyFocus: ReactJS, GatsbyJS, NodeJS, Material UI, TailwindCSS

workExperience.title: Software Engineer Intern
workExperience.description: Interned at Dhiyo.ai, working on various core projects including the complete overhaul of Dhiyo's company website.

projects.name: Dhiyo Company Website
projects.description: I worked on the development of a brand new website for Dhiyo which needed an overhaul in terms of design and technology. The project involved setting up the codebase with the required plugins and CSS libraries, development of all the required screens with functionality following the design given, implementing serverless functions for captcha and form handling, integrating feedback and deploying the website with domain setup.

projects.name: Dhiyo Jio Phone App
projects.description: I worked on the frontend development of a Jio Phone application for Dhiyo which included the essence of the platform with minimal features. The application had to be built keeping in mind the limited screensize and functionalities of a keypad phone. This application was tested on the phone and sent to the Jio Team for publishing.

projects.name: Dhiyo Job Fair Platform
projects.description: I worked on the frontend development of a Job Fair web platform for Dhiyo where attendees of a job fair could register and apply to jobs with their resumes in a job fair. Factors such as low network connectivity, offline persistence and other aspects of a crowded limited network access place had to be considered while developing this portal.
